mainRoute.aboutProject: Some of the tools we used

aboutDevelopers.title: About the developers
aboutDevelopers.arseniy: Hello my name is Arseniy, I'm from Belarus, Gomel. I can confidently say that I learned a lot at rs-school
aboutDevelopers.regina: Frontend web developer, with over a year of commercial experience. She completed courses from RSS and knows how to create web applications on Vue, React, as well as Native TypeScript & JavaScript. And in life, she loves creativity and drawing
aboutDevelopers.ksenia: I’m a Frontend Engineer with a passion for crafting intuitive, high-quality user interfaces. A precise learner with a sharp eye for detail, loving solving complex problems, and seeing the immediate impact of well-executed code. I’m driven by the challenge of turning ideas into responsive, performant, and visually compelling applications.

password.min: Password must be at least 8 symbols
password.lowerCase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter (a-z)
password.upperCase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter (A-Z)
password.digit: Password must contain at least one digit
password.specialSymbol: Password must contain at least one special character !"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\]^_\`{|}~'

email.format: Email address must be properly formatted (e.g., user@example.com)

name.firstLetter: The first letter should be capitalized
name.required: First name must not be empty!

passwordRepeat.match: Repeat password should match current password
